title: Understanding credit score
description: Practice your understanding of credit scores: range, factors that affect it, its purpose, and use.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the main purpose of a credit score?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to measure your income and expenses
to show how much money you have saved
to help lenders decide whether to lend you money

assessment_items.question_content:
Credit score is a range of numbers that helps lenders decide whether to approve someone for a loan.

 **What is the lowest possible credit score a person can have?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Credit score is a range of numbers that helps lenders decide whether to approve someone for a loan.

**What is the highest possible credit score a person can have?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Each credit score number has a matching rating.

**What credit rating does a score of $640$ represent?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Each credit score number has a matching rating.

**What credit rating does a score of $780$ represent?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Many factors go into the calculation of a credit score.

**What is one factor that affects your credit score?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: how long you have had credit accounts

assessment_items.question_content:
Having a low credit score has several drawbacks.

**What is one potential drawback of having a poor or fair credit score?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: You may have to pay higher interest rates.
You may have to file for bankruptcy.

assessment_items.question_content:
The main purpose of credit score is for lenders to decide whether or not to approve someone for a loan, mortgage, or credit card 

**What is one other purpose of your credit score besides applying for loans or credit cards?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Many factors go into the calculation of a credit score.

**What is one factor that affects your credit score?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Having a high credit score and excellent rating has many financial benefits.

**What is the main benefit of having a very good or excellent credit score?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: You can get the best interest rates available.
You can get cash back rewards and bonuses.
You can get free credit reports.

assessment_items.question_content:
Banks rely on credit scores to determine if a person qualifies for a loan, and which interest rate to offer to them.  

**Which of these credit scores would result in the *lowest* interest rate on a loan?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Banks rely on credit scores to determine if a person qualifies for a loan, and which interest rate to offer to them.  

**Which of these credit scores would result in the *highest* interest rate on a loan?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
